Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.ExtendedFormulas.CommonExtension
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaExtension, IPredicateExtension
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension2
Enclosing class:
ExtendedFormulas
public static class ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension extends ExtendedFormulas.CommonExtension implements IPredicateExtension
Implementation of a predicate extension which takes the form of a prefix symbol followed by two predicates and two expressions within parentheses. The children are alternated following the pattern predicate, expression, predicate, expression. Both expressions must bear the same type. The symbol and WD strictness are specified when constructing instances.

  • Method Details

    • typeCheck

      public void typeCheck(ExtendedPredicate predicate, ITypeCheckMediator tcMediator)
      Description copied from interface: IPredicateExtension
      Define type check constraints for the given extended predicate. The given type check mediator is intended to be used for creating type variables when needed, and for adding type constraints.
      Specified by:
      typeCheck in interface IPredicateExtension
      Parameters:
      predicate - the extended predicate to type check
      tcMediator - a type check mediator
